

               +---------------+
               |  API Gateway  |
               +---------------+
                  +-----
                  |
                  |
                  |
  +-----[  Service|Layer  ]------+
  |          +----+---->         |
  |          |+----------------+ |
  |          ||  User Service  | |
  |          |+----------------+ |
  |          |    +-----         |
  |          |    |              |
  |          |    |              |
  |          |    |              |
  |          |    |              |
  |          |    |              |
  | +--------+-[  Data Layer  ]----------+
  | |        v----+----+--------->       |
  | +-----------------+|   /-----------\ |
  | |  Order Service  ||   |  User DB  | |
  | +-----------------+|   \-----------/ |
  | |        +----+----+---------+       |
  +-|--------+---------+---------+       |
    |        |         |                 |
    |        |         |                 |
    |        |         |                 |
    |        v         |                 |
    | /------------\   |                 |
    | |  Order DB  |   |                 |
    | \------------/   |                 |
    |        +---------+                 |
    +--------+---------------------------+
             |
             |
             |
             v
  +--------------------+
  |  Response Builder  |
  +--------------------+
